hero.title: We see more than your photo.
hero.lead: Upload an image. The AI creates a complete profile about you in seconds — from a single photo.
upload.label: Select photo or drag it here
bias.normalTooltip: Factual assessment — the way real algorithms categorize you in the background. Direct, concrete, without exaggeration.
bias.boostTooltip: Maximum exaggeration — shows how a ruthless algorithm would exploit you. Provocative, personal, merciless. None of this is true — but this is how advertising machines think.
disclaimer.main: malziME is a learning tool for media literacy and data privacy awareness. The AI profiles are fictional and only show what algorithms could claim – none of it is true or proven.
disclaimer.workshop: For workshops, stock photos or older images can also be used. No uploaded image is saved or retrievable after analysis.
support.headline: No paywall. No bullshit.
modal.title: Important Notice
modal.text1: malziME is a learning tool for media literacy and data privacy awareness.
modal.text2: The AI profiles are fictional and only show what algorithms could claim — none of it is true or proven.
maintenance.title: Maintenance Mode
maintenance.text: malziME is currently in maintenance mode. Please try again later.
print.note: This information was invented by the AI – None of it is true!
error.rateLimit: Too many requests from your network. Wait a moment and try again shortly.
error.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Please use a smaller photo.
error.invalidFormat: That didn't work. Is it really a photo? Try JPEG or PNG.
error.serverError: The server is having an issue right now. Wait a moment and try again.
error.missingImage: No image detected. Please select a photo.
error.timeout: The analysis is taking too long. Try again or use a different photo.
error.readFailed: The image could not be read. Try a different photo.
error.decodeFailed: The image format is not supported. Try JPEG or PNG.
error.offline: No internet connection. Please check your WiFi.
error.maintenance: malziME is currently in maintenance mode. Please try again later.
error.networkError: Connection to server failed. Check your internet and try again.
render.blockedFallback: The analysis could not be completed. Try with a different photo.
render.emptyProfile: The AI returned an empty profile. Try with a different photo or switch the mode.
targeting.manipTitle: This is how you would be manipulated
verdict.title: This is what the AI thinks about you
blocked.overloaded: A lot of people are using malziME at the same time right now. Please wait a moment and try again.
blocked.safetyFilter: The AI did not analyze the image because the content was classified as sensitive — e.g. because children or minors were detected, or because the image is considered protected. Google's safety filters automatically block evaluation in such cases.
blocked.safetyFilterFallback: The AI was not allowed to view the image directly (Google's safety filter). The analysis via detected image elements was also blocked — the image content was classified as too sensitive.
blocked.apiError: A technical error occurred during the image analysis. This may be due to a temporary server disruption. Try again in a few seconds.
blocked.profileBlocked: The image was detected, but the AI refused to create a profile. This happens when the image content is classified as too sensitive for evaluation.
blocked.noContent: Nothing analyzable was detected in the image — no face, no objects, no text. Try with a different photo.
blocked.generic: The analysis could not be completed. Try with a different photo.
privacy.address: An address or school-related reference may be readable in the image.
privacy.phone: A phone number might be readable.
privacy.licensePlate: A license plate might be visible.
dv.title: Your Data Value
dv.subtitle: This is how much your profile is worth to data brokers — in a single sale.
dv.explain1: Data brokers are companies that collect information about you and sell it to other companies. The €{{amount}} is the price that a single data record about you costs on this market — that is, what can be read from a single photo about you.
dv.explain2: Sounds like little? The problem: Your profile isn't sold just once, but over and over again. Data brokers sell the same data to dozens of different buyers — insurance companies, advertising firms, employers, political campaigns. On average, your profile is resold around {{resales}} times per year.
dv.marketsTitle: Two markets profit from your data
dv.marketsIntro: There isn't just one way to make money from your data — there are two completely separate markets:
dv.brokerExplain: 1. Data brokers — Companies like Acxiom, Oracle or Datalogix buy and sell records about you. Your profile is resold on average {{resales}} × per year. That amounts to approx. €{{brokerYearly}} per year just through trading your data.
dv.platformExplain: 2. Advertising platforms — Meta, Google and TikTok don't sell your data directly, but use it internally to show you personalized ads. Together they earn approx. €{{adYearly}} per year from you.
dv.totalExplain: Together that amounts to over €{{totalYearly}} per year being made from your data.
dv.auction1: The advertising market works differently from the data broker market. Every time an ad is shown to you on Instagram, TikTok or Snapchat, a real-time auction takes place in the background. Companies bid for the right to show you exactly that ad. For this, your profile is transmitted — age, interests, location, behavior — all in milliseconds.
dv.auction2: This happens for European users on average 376 times per day. Each individual auction is worth only fractions of a cent — but over the entire year, that adds up to the approx. €50 that platforms earn from you.
dv.photosTitle: And what about my photos on Snapchat or Instagram?
dv.photos1: This tool analyzes a single photo. But on your Snapchat or Instagram there might be hundreds or thousands of images. Each one contains information: Where you were, who you were with, what you wore, how you felt. Together this creates an extremely detailed profile of your whole life.
dv.photos2: Platforms like Meta don't just analyze your photos, but everything: How long you look at an image, what you like, who you follow, when you're online, where you are. This creates a profile with thousands of data points — much more than this tool can show from a single photo.
dv.breakdownTitle: Most valuable data points from your photo
dv.footnote: Profile value based on data broker prices (Duke University 2023, netzpolitik.org Databroker Files 2024). Resale frequency: derived from market volume (Grand View Research 2024: $278 bn) and individual sale value. Revenue per user: Meta Annual Report 2024 (ARPU Europe: €23.14), Alphabet Annual Report 2024, ByteDance estimate 2024. Real-time data broadcasts: ICCL Reports 2022/2023.
demo.label: No photo handy? Try a sample image:
limit.title: Short break.
limit.text: malziME has been used very frequently this hour and has reached the limit. Analysis is temporarily disabled to prevent costs from exploding.
limit.textMuted: malziME is a privately funded project — free, ad-free and without tracking. This limit protects the project from unexpected server costs.
limit.supportText: With a donation you help increase the limits and keep malziME running.
stats.errorText: Stats could not be loaded. Please try again later.
stats.heroSub: Anonymous usage statistics — no personal data, no cookies, no tracking.
stats.infoCountText: Only the number of analyses — a single number per time period. No images, no IP addresses, no user profiles.
stats.infoLimitText: Each analysis costs money (AI + image recognition). The hourly limit protects the project from unexpected costs.
stats.infoFundingText: malziME is ad-free, without tracking and without paywall. With a donation you help increase the limits and keep the project running.
